overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character in white robes and straw hat walking through a stormy coastal landscape. The character traverses tall reeds by a misty lake, passes under a traditional wooden torii gate, and continues along an open path with heavy rain and wind throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy lakeside with tall reeds and rocky cliffs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall reeds and grass along the stormy water's edge, with rocky cliffs to the left

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall covered with patches of greenery forming the left boundary
dense tall green reeds and grass swaying in the storm wind
choppy dark water with whitecaps from the heavy rain and wind
wind-swept pine tree with gnarled branches extending over the water
fog-shrouded mountains visible through the rain in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through dense tall reeds along a stormy lakeshore, with a steep rocky cliff face on the left and choppy dark water on the right. Heavy rain falls continuously as wind sweeps through the vegetation, creating a moody, enclosed atmosphere with limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to wooden torii gate along misty shore

events.description: large wooden torii gate comes into view ahead on the path
character passes underneath the wooden torii gate structure

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing under the large wooden torii gate while maintaining a steady pace along the stone path

entered.detail: traditional Japanese wooden gate with two vertical pillars and two horizontal crossbars, weathered dark wood
small traditional stone lantern partially obscured by vegetation
wet stone slabs forming a path leading toward the torii gate

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense reeds onto a stone footpath leading toward a prominent wooden torii gate. The space opens slightly as the character approaches and passes under the traditional gate structure, with the rocky cliff still flanking the left side and the stormy water now more distant to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open misty coastal path with distant mountains

events.description: exiting the torii gate area into wide open coastal landscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the open stone path away from the shrine gate toward the misty coastal horizon

entered.detail: expansive fog-filled valley opening up beyond the torii gate with low visibility
dark tree-covered hills visible through the mist across the water
open grassland replacing the dense vegetation of the previous areas

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the torii gate, the character enters a wide-open misty landscape with expansive views of the fog-shrouded coast and distant forested mountains. The path continues through open grassland with the rocky cliff still present on the left, while heavy rain and wind persist across the exposed terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, stormy lakeshore that gradually opens into an expansive, mist-shrouded coastal vista. It begins with the character navigating dense tall reeds between a steep rocky cliff and choppy dark water, where heavy rain and wind create a moody, enclosed atmosphere. As the character emerges from the vegetation, the space opens slightly onto a stone footpath that leads directly under a prominent wooden torii gate. The scene then expands beyond the gate into a wide-open landscape of grassland and fog, revealing distant forested mountains and a vast coastline. The camera continues to follow the character across this exposed terrain, with the rocky cliff remaining on the left while the storm persists across the widening horizon.
